purpose.summary: This copybook defines the structure of PADFLPCB, which appears to be a PCB (Program Communication Block) used in an IMS (Information Management System) environment. It contains fields related to database name, segment level, PCB status, processing options, segment name, key feedback, number of sensitive segments, and key feedback area.

paragraphs.purpose: This copybook defines the data structure for PADFLPCB, which is likely a Program Communication Block (PCB) used within an IMS (Information Management System) environment. The PCB provides a communication interface between an application program and the IMS database. The structure includes PADFL-DBDNAME (database name), PADFL-SEG-LEVEL (segment level), PADFL-PCB-STATUS (PCB status), PADFL-PCB-PROCOPT (processing options), PADFL-SEG-NAME (segment name), PADFL-KEYFB-NAME (key feedback name), PADFL-NUM-SENSEGS (number of sensitive segments), and PADFL-KEYFB (key feedback area). These fields provide information about the database, segment, and processing options being used by the application program. The PADFL-KEYFB field is a 255-byte area that contains the key feedback information from the database. This copybook does not perform any processing or call any other programs; it simply defines a data structure for use by other programs.
paragraphs.dead_code_reason: Record layout 'PADFLPCB' is never used by any program
